name: workflow-studio
description: Node-based workflow studio for AI-powered Jira, Slack, and process composition

scripts.build: esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outdir=dist --external:readline && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/cli.js';fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))" && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.electron:pack: npm run icons && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.electron:dist: npm run icons && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.electron:dist:mac: npm run icons && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:dist:win: npm run icons && npm run build && electron-builder --win
